parsed_profile.extraction_summary: Only Volume 1 (chapters 1-25) contains distillable content. Volumes 2-25 returned entirely as LLM fallback stubs with zero confidence across all 25 chapters per volume batch. 609 total chapters attempted; 3 sample cards verified as llm_fallback across early, mid, and terminal positions confirming systemic upstream failure.
parsed_profile.known_arc_function: Foundation-building volume establishing protagonist's dual-life strategy: covert cultivation advancement, secret business empire, transmigrator advantage through historical foreknowledge, and careful navigation of political timeline. Closes with major political upheaval hook that will reshape all trajectories.

reader_promise.primary_tension: Protagonist must simultaneously advance cultivation in secret while building legitimate business empire, leveraging transmigrator foreknowledge to navigate political timeline without exposing hidden capabilities
reader_promise.satisfaction_structure: Readers experience progressive power acquisition through dual concealment channels, strategic exploitation of future knowledge, and escalating political complexity that threatens to expose the protagonist's true capabilities
reader_promise.emotional_core: The tension between revealed competence (business/cultivation success) and concealed identity (transmigrator nature, true power level) creates sustained dramatic irony
reader_promise.closure_mechanism: Volume 1 closes with political upheaval that threatens the protagonist's careful equilibrium, setting up forced trajectory shifts and expanded conflict scope

core_engine.mechanism_summary: Protagonist possesses transmigrator advantage through historical foreknowledge, enabling strategic pre-positioning, optimal faction alignment, and exploitation of timeline-aware manipulation. This is layered with dual operational domains: covert cultivation advancement (concealed power growth) and public business empire (legitimate wealth/status foundation).
